questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "thing"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "omit"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "comma"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "specify"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "modify"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "sentence"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "detail"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "link"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "relate"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "whom"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "structure"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "relative"?
Choose the best word: Build one complex _____.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Build one complex sentence." — từ đúng là "sentence" (câu).

questions.question: Choose the best word: She added an important _____.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "She added an important detail." — từ đúng là "detail" (chi tiết).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Relative pronouns _____ clauses.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Relative pronouns link clauses." — từ đúng là "link" (liên kết).

questions.question: Choose the best word: The clauses _____ two ideas.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "The clauses relate two ideas." — từ đúng là "relate" (liên quan).

questions.question: Choose the best word: The woman _____ I met is kind.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "The woman whom I met is kind." — từ đúng là "whom" (người mà (tân ngữ)).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Learn the clause _____.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Learn the clause structure." — từ đúng là "structure" (cấu trúc).

questions.question: Choose the best word: A _____ clause adds information.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "A relative clause adds information." — từ đúng là "relative" (quan hệ).

questions.question: Choose the best word: This sentence has two _____s.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "This sentence has two clauses." — từ đúng là "clause" (mệnh đề).

questions.question: Choose the best word: The man _____ called is my uncle.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "The man who called is my uncle." — từ đúng là "who" (người mà).

questions.question: Choose the best word: The book _____ I read was good.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "The book which I read was good." — từ đúng là "which" (cái mà).

questions.question: Choose the best word: The car _____ he bought is red.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "The car that he bought is red." — từ đúng là "that" (mà).

questions.question: Choose the best word: This is the house _____ I grew up.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "This is the house where I grew up." — từ đúng là "where" (nơi mà).

questions.question: Complete the sentence: The man ___ called is my uncle.
Complete the sentence: The book ___ I read was good.
Complete the sentence: This is the house ___ I was born.
Complete the sentence: The boy ___ dog is lost is crying.
Complete the sentence: The car ___ he bought is red.
Complete the sentence: The woman ___ I met is a doctor.
questions.explanation: 'Whom' is the object pronoun for people.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: The city ___ we visited was lovely.
questions.explanation: 'Which' refers to a thing/place as object.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: People ___ exercise are healthier.
Complete the sentence: The shop ___ sells books is closed.
questions.explanation: 'Which' refers to a thing as subject.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: The day ___ we met was sunny.
Which English word means "vật"?
Which English word means "lược bỏ"?
Which English word means "dấu phẩy"?
Which English word means "chỉ rõ"?
Which English word means "bổ nghĩa"?
Which English word means "câu"?
